Equity Research Analyst Note

To: Stakeholders of Quantum Innovations Pte. Ltd.
From: Dr. Alex Tan, Senior Analyst
Date: October 15, 2023

We are issuing a brief update on Quantum Innovations Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T12345678A), ahead of their Q3 earnings release scheduled for November 2, 2023. Our analysis, led by Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, suggests that earnings will likely exceed market expectations due to robust performance in their AI division. Please direct any inquiries to me at alex.tan@analysiscorp.sg or call +65 6123 4567.

Mr. Ramasamy Muthu has raised concerns regarding the current project status, specifically highlighting delays in the development of their new robotics platform. While this could impact future projections, our current valuation remains unchanged. The Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") signed last quarter remains a pivotal factor in our long-term outlook. Further details can be accessed at https://example.sg/user/S 2345 678 Z.

For more specific queries regarding the SPA, stakeholders may contact Ms. Siti Aishah directly at siti.abdullah@quantum.sg.
